commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: A focused automated repair can update the git approval classifier and add regression coverage without changing the broader PR design.; Needs attention: The diff still has an approval-safety issue where opaque git commands can hide shell execution in simple mode.; Review finding: [P1] Fail closed on opaque git commands — src/infra/plugin-approvals.ts:1697-1702 (sha=b28e8c8cc9851d505ee659f076438208003269f7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `approvals.plugin.language` modes and a plain-English plugin approval renderer, wires it through forwarding/Telegram/Matrix paths, and updates config docs/schema/tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking finding: source inspection of PR head shows unknown git subcommands use the medium-risk no-preview fallback, and Git documents `submodule foreach` as arbitrary shell execution. The feature request itself is not a bug reproduction case.
commands.review_followup: A focused automated repair can update the git approval classifier and add regression coverage without changing the broader PR design.
commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.repair_reason: Human/contributor follow-up is needed because the branch has blocking correctness/security findings and lacks after-fix real behavior proof for the current head.; Needs attention: Needs attention because the patch changes a credential-path export from a primitive string to a runtime object.; Review finding: [P1] Keep WA_WEB_AUTH_DIR a primitive string — extensions/whatsapp/src/auth-store.ts:62 - [P2] Keep blank agen... (sha=6a9a6c42cf5964556e488c05854c83cc0db1ab82)
commands.review_summary:
This PR defers WhatsApp default web auth-dir resolution, adds profile auth-dir regression coverage, exposes shared test-env helpers to plugin tests, and loosens one persisted cron payload validation.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main is source-reproducible because WA_WEB_AUTH_DIR is computed at module evaluation while resolveOAuthDir is profile-env aware when called after OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR is active; the linked issue also gives concrete profile-gateway commands and logs.
commands.review_followup: Human/contributor follow-up is needed because the branch has blocking correctness/security findings and lacks after-fix real behavior proof for the current head.
